aleabit.layer_label: Layer 3 — 力传感器（6 轴力 + 应变片）
aleabit.verdict_label: 多维力传感器 humanoid 触觉关键
aleabit.thesis: 6-axis force/torque sensors are the eyes-of-the-hand for humanoid robots. ATI Industrial dominates globally. Keli is the China leader with real strain-gauge IP.

signals.name: 供应链汇聚
signals.note: 国内称重/力传感器龙头，向 6 轴扩展

signals.name: 分析师覆盖率 < 3
signals.note: 国内中等覆盖，西方机构低

signals.name: 技术深度门槛
signals.note: 6 轴力传感器解耦算法 + 应变片工艺真门槛

red_flags: 主营仍是工业称重，humanoid 力传感器收入占比初期
aleabit.ai_relevance: Humanoid 灵巧手/关节力反馈直接相关
